ddls:
CREATE TABLE "event_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the event item */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event for which the item is planned */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event item */,
  "budgeted_cost" TEXT /* Budgeted cost for the event item */,
  "actual_cost" TEXT /* Actual cost incurred for the event item */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the event item */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the item (e.g., 'Planned', 'In Progress', 'Completed') */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the item was last updated */,
  "planner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the planner who created or updated the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_items_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES event_planning ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_items_planner_id FOREIGN KEY ("planner_id") REFERENCES event_planners ("planner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Registration, Platform, In-person events) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_planning" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., Conference, Workshop) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the event */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the event is held */,
  "planner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event planner responsible for the event */,
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the budget overview for the event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the event planning (e.g., Planning, Execution, Completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the event planning was initiated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the event planning was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_planning_budget_id FOREIGN KEY ("budget_id") REFERENCES budget_overviews ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_planning_planner_id FOREIGN KEY ("planner_id") REFERENCES event_planners ("planner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the platform (e.g., Hopin, Zoom, Streamyard) */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription for the platform */,
  "subscription_cost" TEXT /* Cost of the subscription */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event for which the platform is used */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the platform subscription (e.g., Active, Suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the platform subscription was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the platform subscription was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_platforms_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES event_planning ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event for which the activity is planned */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity */,
  "planned_cost" TEXT /* Planned cost for the activity */,
  "actual_cost" TEXT /* Actual cost incurred for the activity */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the activity (e.g., Planned, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the activity was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the activity was last updated */,
  "responsible_planner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the planner responsible for the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_activities_responsible_planner_id FOREIGN KEY ("responsible_planner_id") REFERENCES event_planners ("planner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_activities_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES event_planning ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_planners" (
  "planner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event planner */,
  "planner_name" TEXT /* Full name of the event planner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the event planner */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the event planner */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the event planner belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the event planner (e.g., Lead Planner, Assistant) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the planner was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the planner's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("planner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_overviews" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget overview */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "total_budgeted" TEXT /* Total budgeted cost for the event */,
  "total_actual" TEXT /* Total actual cost for the event */,
  "budget_variance" TEXT /* Variance between budgeted and actual costs */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the budget overview was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the budget overview was last updated */,
  "planner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the planner who created or updated the budget overview */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_overviews_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES event_planning ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_overviews_planner_id FOREIGN KEY ("planner_id") REFERENCES event_planners ("planner_id")
)
